highlights.text: I wrote on Thursday at 4pm: “A Failed Breakdown of today’s 6370 daily low is always of interest.” and “My general lean is to defer to the trend.
Y esterday’s newsletter was sent out early and the main mission for bulls was to do the usual: Buy any Nvidia earnings dip, on a Failed Breakdown.
I wrote at 4pm yesterday: “The Failed Breakdown is obvious: It is of today’s 6474 low.” What did we do?
We flushed 6474 after Nvdia, recovered in a Failed Breakdown and squeezed.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into a very unorthodox Failed Breakdown we had Tuesday morning and its essential to know what these look like.
Not every Failed Breakdown will be textbook.

post_title: New All Time Highs For SPX. Can Bulls Run It, Or Is It a Trap? August 29th Plan
